metrics.name: Current Ratio
metrics.methodology: Current Ratio = Current Assets / Current Liabilities

metrics.name: Quick Ratio (Acid Test)
metrics.methodology: Quick Ratio = (Current Assets − Inventory) / Current Liabilities

metrics.name: Gross Profit Margin
metrics.methodology: Gross Margin = ((Revenue − COGS) / Revenue) × 100

metrics.name: Operating Margin (EBIT)
metrics.methodology: Operating Margin = (Operating Income / Revenue) × 100

metrics.name: EBITDA Margin
metrics.methodology: EBITDA Margin = (EBITDA / Revenue) × 100

metrics.name: Net Profit Margin
metrics.methodology: Net Profit Margin = (Net Income / Revenue) × 100

metrics.name: Revenue Growth Rate
metrics.methodology: Revenue Growth = ((Current Period Revenue − Prior Period Revenue) / Prior Period Revenue) × 100

metrics.name: Working Capital
metrics.methodology: Working Capital = Current Assets − Current Liabilities

metrics.name: Days Sales Outstanding (DSO)
metrics.methodology: DSO = (Accounts Receivable / Total Credit Sales) × Number of Days

metrics.name: Days Payable Outstanding (DPO)
metrics.methodology: DPO = (Accounts Payable / COGS) × Number of Days

metrics.name: Cash Conversion Cycle
metrics.methodology: CCC = DSO + Days Inventory Outstanding − DPO

metrics.name: Operating Cash Flow
metrics.methodology: Operating Cash Flow = Net Income + Non-Cash Charges − Increase in Working Capital

metrics.name: Monthly Burn Rate
metrics.methodology: Net Burn = Cash Out − Cash In (per month)

metrics.name: Cash Runway
metrics.methodology: Runway (months) = Current Cash Balance / Monthly Net Burn

metrics.name: Headcount (FTE)
metrics.methodology: Period-end count of active employees expressed as full-time equivalents (directly measured, not calculated).

metrics.name: Debt Service Coverage Ratio (DSCR)
metrics.methodology: DSCR = Net Operating Income / Annual Debt Service

metrics.name: Vacancy Rate
metrics.methodology: Vacancy Rate = (Number of Vacant Units / Total Units) * 100

metrics.name: Loan-to-Value Ratio (LTV)
metrics.methodology: LTV = (Mortgage Amount / Property Appraised Value) * 100

metrics.name: Gross Rent Multiplier (GRM)
metrics.methodology: GRM = Property Price / Gross Rental Income

metrics.name: Net Operating Income (NOI)
metrics.methodology: NOI = Gross Rental Income - Operating Expenses

metrics.name: Return on Investment (ROI)
metrics.methodology: ROI = ((Net Profit / Cost of Investment) * 100)

metrics.name: Cash Flow
metrics.methodology: Cash Flow = Rental Income - Operating Expenses - Debt Service

metrics.name: Capitalization Rate (Cap Rate)
metrics.methodology: Cap Rate = (NOI / Property Value) * 100

metrics.name: Cash-on-Cash Return
metrics.methodology: Cash-on-Cash Return = (Net Cash Flow / Initial Cash Investment) * 100

metrics.name: Monthly Recurring Revenue (MRR)
metrics.methodology: MRR = Σ (Active Subscriptions × Monthly Subscription Price)

metrics.name: Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR)
metrics.methodology: ARR = MRR × 12

metrics.name: Net Revenue Retention (NRR)
metrics.methodology: NRR = ((Starting MRR + Expansion − Contraction − Churn) / Starting MRR) × 100

metrics.name: Gross Revenue Churn Rate
metrics.methodology: Gross Churn = (Churned MRR / Starting MRR) × 100

metrics.name: Customer Acquisition Cost (CAC)
metrics.methodology: CAC = Total Sales & Marketing Spend / New Customers Acquired

metrics.name: Customer Lifetime Value (LTV)
metrics.methodology: LTV = (Average Revenue per Account × Gross Margin %) / Churn Rate

metrics.name: LTV : CAC Ratio
metrics.methodology: LTV:CAC = Customer Lifetime Value / Customer Acquisition Cost

metrics.name: Rule of 40
metrics.methodology: Rule of 40 = Revenue Growth % + Profit Margin %

metrics.name: Same-Store NOI Growth
metrics.methodology: Same-Store NOI Growth = ((Current NOI − Prior NOI) / Prior NOI) × 100 on comparable set

metrics.name: Operating Expense Ratio
metrics.methodology: OER = (Operating Expenses / Effective Gross Income) × 100

metrics.name: Energy Cost per Square Foot
metrics.methodology: Energy Cost per SF = Total Energy Cost / Rentable Square Feet

metrics.name: Funds From Operations
metrics.methodology: FFO per NAREIT or trust reporting definition (directly reported aggregate).

metrics.name: FFO Payout Ratio
metrics.methodology: FFO Payout = (Distributions / FFO) × 100

metrics.name: REIT Same-Store NOI Growth
metrics.methodology: Same-Store NOI Growth = ((Current NOI − Prior NOI) / Prior NOI) × 100

metrics.methodology: Current Ratio = Current Assets / Current Liabilities

metrics.name: Quick Ratio (Acid Test)
metrics.methodology: Quick Ratio = (Current Assets − Inventory) / Current Liabilities

metrics.methodology: Gross Margin = ((Revenue − COGS) / Revenue) × 100

metrics.name: Headcount (FTE)
metrics.methodology: Period-end count of active employees expressed as full-time equivalents (directly measured, not calculated).

metrics.name: Predictive Maintenance Cost Savings
metrics.methodology: Potential Repair Cost Avoided - Predictive Maintenance Cost

metrics.name: Cost per Kilogram of Produce
metrics.methodology: Total Production Cost (Seeds, Fertilizers, Nutrients) + Total Operational Cost (Labor, Energy, Water, Maintenance) / Total Yield (kg)

metrics.name: Energy Cost per Unit of Light Delivered
metrics.methodology: Energy Consumed (kWh) / Total Light Delivered (lux-hours or similar unit)

metrics.name: Crop Health Index
metrics.methodology: Crop Health Index = (Sum of Health Scores / Total Number of Crops) * 100

metrics.name: Profit Margin
metrics.methodology: Revenue from Produce Sales - Total Production Cost - Total Operational Cost

metrics.name: Labor Cost per Kilogram of Produce
metrics.methodology: Labor Cost per Kilogram of Produce = Total Labor Costs / Total Harvested Produce (kg)

metrics.name: Water Usage Efficiency
metrics.methodology: Water Usage Efficiency = Total Harvested Produce (kg) / Total Water Used (liters)

metrics.name: Yield per Square Meter
metrics.methodology: Yield per Square Meter = Total Harvested Produce (kg) / Total Growing Area (m²)

metrics.name: Energy Consumption per Square Meter
metrics.methodology: Energy Consumption per Square Meter = Total Energy Consumed (kWh) / Total Growing Area (m²)

metrics.methodology: MRR = Σ (Active Subscriptions × Monthly Subscription Price)

metrics.methodology: ARR = MRR × 12

metrics.name: Gross Revenue Churn Rate
metrics.methodology: Gross Churn = (Churned MRR / Starting MRR) × 100

metrics.name: Driver Turnover Rate
metrics.methodology: (Number of drivers who left / Total number of drivers) * 100

metrics.name: Fuel Efficiency
metrics.methodology: Total miles driven / Total fuel used

metrics.name: On-Time Delivery Rate
metrics.methodology: (Number of on-time deliveries / Total deliveries) * 100

metrics.name: Fleet Utilization Rate
metrics.methodology: (Total time fleet in use / Total available fleet time) * 100

metrics.name: Maintenance Cost per Mile
metrics.methodology: Total maintenance costs / Total miles driven

metrics.name: Train Utilization
metrics.methodology: Train Utilization = (Loaded Train-Miles / Available Train-Miles) × 100

metrics.name: Cost per Ton-Mile
metrics.methodology: Cost per Ton-Mile = Total Operating Cost / Ton-Miles Moved

metrics.name: On-Time Train Performance
metrics.methodology: OTP = (On-Time Shipments / Total Shipments) × 100

metrics.name: Vessel Utilization
metrics.methodology: Vessel Utilization = (Operating Days / Available Days) × 100

metrics.name: Time Charter Equivalent (TCE)
metrics.methodology: TCE = (Voyage Revenue − Voyage Costs) / On-Hire Days

metrics.name: Schedule Reliability
metrics.methodology: Reliability = (On-Schedule Voyages / Total Voyages) × 100

metrics.name: Gross Margin per Shipment
metrics.methodology: Margin per Shipment = Gross Profit / Shipments Handled

metrics.name: On-Time Delivery (Shipper SLA)
metrics.methodology: OTD = (On-Time Shipments / Total Shipments) × 100

metrics.methodology: Load Factor = (RPM or RTM / ASM or ATM) × 100

metrics.methodology: CASM = Total Operating Cost / Available Seat Kilometers

metrics.name: Revenue per Available Seat Kilometer (RASM)
metrics.methodology: RASM = Total Operating Revenue / Available Seat Kilometers

metrics.name: On-Time Performance (OTP)
metrics.methodology: OTP = (On-Time Arrivals / Total Arrivals) × 100

metrics.name: Fuel Cost Percent of Operating Cost
metrics.methodology: Fuel % = (Fuel Expense / Total Operating Cost) × 100

metrics.name: Passengers Enplaned Growth
metrics.methodology: Growth = ((Current Enplanements − Prior Enplanements) / Prior Enplanements) × 100

metrics.name: Aeronautical Revenue per Passenger
metrics.methodology: ARPP = Aeronautical Revenue / Enplaned Passengers

metrics.name: Commercial Revenue Share
metrics.methodology: Share = (Commercial Revenue / Total Revenue) × 100

metrics.name: Gross Booking Value Take Rate
metrics.methodology: Take Rate = (Platform Revenue / Gross Booking Value) × 100

metrics.name: Look-to-Book Conversion
metrics.methodology: Conversion = (Completed Bookings / Qualified Sessions) × 100

metrics.name: Cargo Load Factor
metrics.methodology: Cargo Load Factor = (Cargo Tonne-Km Carried / Available Tonne-Km) × 100

metrics.name: Cargo Yield per Tonne-Kilometer
metrics.methodology: Yield = Cargo Revenue / Cargo Tonne-Kilometers Carried

metrics.methodology: Count of active R&D programs in the period (directly measured).

metrics.name: Trial Cost per Patient
metrics.methodology: Trial Cost per Patient = Total Trial Cost / Patients Enrolled

metrics.name: Phase Success Rate
metrics.methodology: Phase Success Rate = (Phases Passed / Phases Attempted) × 100

metrics.name: Batch Yield
metrics.methodology: Batch Yield = (Good Units / Total Units) × 100

metrics.name: COGS per Unit
metrics.methodology: COGS per Unit = Total COGS / Units Produced

metrics.name: Current Ratio
metrics.methodology: Current Ratio = Current Assets / Current Liabilities

metrics.name: Quick Ratio (Acid Test)
metrics.methodology: Quick Ratio = (Current Assets − Inventory) / Current Liabilities

metrics.name: Gross Profit Margin
metrics.methodology: Gross Margin = ((Revenue − COGS) / Revenue) × 100

metrics.name: Operating Margin (EBIT)
metrics.methodology: Operating Margin = (Operating Income / Revenue) × 100

metrics.name: EBITDA Margin
metrics.methodology: EBITDA Margin = (EBITDA / Revenue) × 100

metrics.name: Net Profit Margin
metrics.methodology: Net Profit Margin = (Net Income / Revenue) × 100

metrics.name: Revenue Growth Rate
metrics.methodology: Revenue Growth = ((Current Period Revenue − Prior Period Revenue) / Prior Period Revenue) × 100

metrics.name: Working Capital
metrics.methodology: Working Capital = Current Assets − Current Liabilities

metrics.name: Days Sales Outstanding (DSO)
metrics.methodology: DSO = (Accounts Receivable / Total Credit Sales) × Number of Days

metrics.name: Days Payable Outstanding (DPO)
metrics.methodology: DPO = (Accounts Payable / COGS) × Number of Days

metrics.name: Cash Conversion Cycle
metrics.methodology: CCC = DSO + Days Inventory Outstanding − DPO

metrics.name: Operating Cash Flow
metrics.methodology: Operating Cash Flow = Net Income + Non-Cash Charges − Increase in Working Capital

metrics.name: Monthly Burn Rate
metrics.methodology: Net Burn = Cash Out − Cash In (per month)

metrics.name: Cash Runway
metrics.methodology: Runway (months) = Current Cash Balance / Monthly Net Burn

metrics.name: Headcount (FTE)
metrics.methodology: Period-end count of active employees expressed as full-time equivalents (directly measured, not calculated).

metrics.name: Net Interest Margin
metrics.methodology: NIM = (Net Interest Income / Average Earning Assets) × 100

metrics.name: Non-Performing Loan Ratio
metrics.methodology: NPL Ratio = (Non-Performing Loans / Total Loans) × 100

metrics.name: Loan-to-Deposit Ratio
metrics.methodology: LTD = (Total Loans / Total Deposits) × 100

metrics.name: Efficiency Ratio
metrics.methodology: Efficiency Ratio = (Operating Expense / Total Revenue) × 100

metrics.name: Tier 1 Capital Ratio
metrics.methodology: Tier 1 Ratio = (Tier 1 Capital / Risk-Weighted Assets) × 100

metrics.name: Cost of Funds
metrics.methodology: Cost of Funds = Interest Expense on Deposits and Borrowings / Average Interest-Bearing Liabilities × 100

metrics.name: Stable Funding Ratio
metrics.methodology: Stable Funding Ratio = Stable Funding / Total Funding × 100

metrics.name: Liquidity Coverage Ratio
metrics.methodology: LCR = HQLA / Net Cash Outflows over 30 days × 100

metrics.name: Net Stable Funding Ratio
metrics.methodology: NSFR = Available Stable Funding / Required Stable Funding × 100

metrics.name: Interest Rate Risk EVE Sensitivity
metrics.methodology: EVE sensitivity = ΔEVE / Base EVE for standard shock

metrics.name: Operational Risk Loss Ratio
metrics.methodology: Op Risk Loss Ratio = Operational Losses / Gross Income × 100

metrics.name: Stress Test CET1 Delta
metrics.methodology: CET1 Delta = Stressed CET1 − Baseline CET1

metrics.methodology: Directly measured AUM at reporting date.

metrics.name: Net Flow Rate
metrics.methodology: Net Flow Rate = ((Inflows − Outflows) / Beginning AUM) × 100

metrics.name: Management Fee Yield
metrics.methodology: Fee Yield = (Management Fees / Average AUM) × 100

metrics.name: Performance Fee Share
metrics.methodology: Performance Fee Share = (Performance Fees / Total Fund Revenue) × 100

metrics.name: Fund IRR
metrics.methodology: IRR from aggregated cash flows and NAV (directly reported).

metrics.methodology: TVPI = (Distributions + NAV) / Paid-In Capital

metrics.name: DPI
metrics.methodology: DPI = Distributions / Paid-In Capital

metrics.name: Capital Deployment Rate
metrics.methodology: Deployment Rate = (Called Capital / Committed Capital) × 100

metrics.name: Fund Leverage Ratio
metrics.methodology: Leverage Ratio = Total Fund Debt / NAV

metrics.name: Liquidity Gate Frequency
metrics.methodology: Gate Frequency = Gated Funds / Total Funds × 100

metrics.name: Strategy Return Volatility
metrics.methodology: Standard deviation of periodic returns annualized

metrics.name: Assets Under Custody
metrics.methodology: Directly measured AUC at reporting date

metrics.name: Custody Fee Yield
metrics.methodology: Custody Fee Yield = Custody Fees / Average AUC × 100

metrics.name: Settlement Fail Rate
metrics.methodology: Fail Rate = Failed Settlements / Total Instructions × 100

metrics.name: Safekeeping Asset Growth
metrics.methodology: Growth = ((Current AUC − Prior) / Prior) × 100

metrics.name: RVPI
metrics.methodology: RVPI = NAV / Paid-In Capital

metrics.name: Investment Close Rate
metrics.methodology: Close Rate = (Closed Investments / Qualified Opportunities) × 100

metrics.name: Average Investment Size
metrics.methodology: Average Size = Deployed Capital / New Investments

metrics.methodology: Directly measured count at reporting date.

metrics.methodology: Directly measured count at reporting date.

metrics.name: Active Portfolio Company Count
metrics.methodology: Directly measured count at reporting date.

metrics.name: Follow-On Investment Rate
metrics.methodology: Follow-On Rate = (Follow-On Investments / Eligible Portfolio Companies) × 100

metrics.name: Portfolio Write-Down Rate
metrics.methodology: Write-Down Rate = (Impaired Carrying Value / Portfolio Cost Basis) × 100

metrics.name: Co-Investment Participation Rate
metrics.methodology: Co-Investment Rate = (Deals with Co-Investors / Total Closed Deals) × 100

metrics.methodology: Progress = (Committed Capital / Fundraising Target) × 100

metrics.methodology: Coverage = Management Fees / Operating Expenses

metrics.methodology: Delinquency Rate = (Delinquent Balance 30+ / Total Receivables) × 100

metrics.methodology: Origination Growth = ((Current Originations − Prior Originations) / Prior Originations) × 100

metrics.name: Card Payment Volume
metrics.methodology: Directly measured payment volume in period.

metrics.methodology: BNPL Growth = ((Current BNPL Originations − Prior) / Prior) × 100

metrics.name: Embedded Finance Revenue Share
metrics.methodology: Embedded Share = (Embedded Channel Revenue / Total Consumer Finance Revenue) × 100

metrics.methodology: Directly measured RTP volume in period.

metrics.methodology: Directly measured acquiring volume in period.

metrics.name: Residential Mortgage Portfolio Yield
metrics.methodology: Portfolio Yield = (Interest Income / Average Mortgage Balances) × 100

metrics.name: Residential Mortgage 30+ Day Delinquency
metrics.methodology: Delinquency Rate = (Delinquent Balance 30+ / Total Mortgage Balances) × 100

metrics.name: Residential Mortgage Weighted Average LTV
metrics.methodology: WA LTV = Σ(Loan Balance × LTV) / Σ Loan Balances

metrics.name: Residential Mortgage Origination Growth
metrics.methodology: Origination Growth = ((Current − Prior) / Prior) × 100

metrics.name: Commercial Loan Growth
metrics.methodology: Loan Growth = ((Current Outstanding − Prior Outstanding) / Prior Outstanding) × 100

metrics.name: Commercial Portfolio Yield
metrics.methodology: Portfolio Yield = (Interest Income / Average Commercial Loans) × 100

metrics.name: Commercial NPL Ratio
metrics.methodology: NPL Ratio = (Non-Performing Commercial Loans / Total Commercial Loans) × 100

metrics.name: Commercial Net Charge-Off Rate
metrics.methodology: NCO Rate = (Net Charge-Offs / Average Commercial Loans) × 100

metrics.name: Commercial Origination Volume Growth
metrics.methodology: Origination Growth = ((Current Originations − Prior Originations) / Prior Originations) × 100

metrics.name: Commercial 30+ Day Delinquency Rate
metrics.methodology: Delinquency Rate = (Delinquent Balance 30+ / Total Commercial Loans) × 100

metrics.name: Weighted Average LTV
metrics.methodology: WA LTV = Σ(Loan Balance × LTV) / Σ Loan Balances

metrics.name: Portfolio DSCR
metrics.methodology: Portfolio DSCR = Σ(DSCR × Loan Weight) on reporting book

metrics.name: Sector Concentration Index
metrics.methodology: HHI = Σ(Sector Share²) × 10000 on outstanding balances

metrics.name: Revolver Utilization Rate
metrics.methodology: Utilization = (Drawn Commitments / Total Commitments) × 100

metrics.name: Treasury Fee Yield
metrics.methodology: Treasury Fee Yield = (Treasury Fee Revenue / Average Commercial Deposits) × 100

metrics.name: Commercial Payment Volume
metrics.methodology: Directly measured payment volume in period.

metrics.name: Sustainable Finance Share
metrics.methodology: Sustainable Share = (Sustainable Loan Balance / Total Commercial Loans) × 100

metrics.name: Monthly Recurring Revenue (MRR)
metrics.methodology: MRR = Σ (Active Subscriptions × Monthly Subscription Price)

metrics.name: Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR)
metrics.methodology: ARR = MRR × 12

metrics.name: Net Revenue Retention (NRR)
metrics.methodology: NRR = ((Starting MRR + Expansion − Contraction − Churn) / Starting MRR) × 100

metrics.name: Gross Revenue Churn Rate
metrics.methodology: Gross Churn = (Churned MRR / Starting MRR) × 100

metrics.name: Customer Acquisition Cost (CAC)
metrics.methodology: CAC = Total Sales & Marketing Spend / New Customers Acquired

metrics.name: Customer Lifetime Value (LTV)
metrics.methodology: LTV = (Average Revenue per Account × Gross Margin %) / Churn Rate

metrics.name: LTV : CAC Ratio
metrics.methodology: LTV:CAC = Customer Lifetime Value / Customer Acquisition Cost

metrics.name: Rule of 40
metrics.methodology: Rule of 40 = Revenue Growth % + Profit Margin %
